LAW AND MOTION 302, ASSIGNEE WILLIAM BUCHANAN'S MOTION FOR CONTINUANCE - THE COURT TREATS THE MOTION FOR CONTINUANCE AS A MOTION FOR RELIEF PER CCP 473. THE EVIDENCE DEMONSTRATES THAT PLAINTIFF NEVER RECEIVED THE MOTION TO VACATE THAT WAS HEARD AND GRANTED AS UNOPPOSED ON FEBRUARY 27, 2013. THE COURT VACATES THE FEBRUARY 27, 2013 ORDER. DEFENDANT SHALL RE-FILE AND RE-SERVE THE MOTION TO VACATE. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER #5976.

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT JASON MOORE'S MOTION TO VACATE SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT AND STAY ENFORCEMENT - THE SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT IS VACATED. (CCP 1710.40(A).) A SINGLE SALE OF A CAR ON EBAY IS INSUFFICIENT TO SUBJECT DEFENDANT TO LOCAL PERSONAL JURISDICTION. (BOSCHETTO V. HANSING (9TH CIR. 2008) 539 F.3D 1011, 1018-1019.) PLAINTIFFS HAVE NOT PRESENTED SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE TO ESTABLISH PERSONAL JURISDICTION OF DEFENDANT IN ARIZONA. THE ALTERNATIVE RELIEF FOR A STAY IS DENIED AS MOOT IN LIGHT OF THIS RULING. (CCP 1710.50.) ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR # 6185
ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT AND STAY ENFORCEMENT

calendar.matters:
Mtn To Vacate Sister-State Judgmnt
Off Calendar Jul-08-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - JASON MOORE, TEL. NO. 205-6458, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JASON MOORE's motion To Vacate Sister-State Judgment and Stay Enforcement - The sister-state judgment is vacated. (CCP 1710.40(a).) A single sale of a car on eBay is insufficient to subject Defendant to local personal jurisdiction. (Boschetto v. Hansing (9th Cir. 2008) 539 F.3d 1011, 1018-1019.) Plaintiffs have not presented sufficient evidence to establish personal jurisdiction of Defendant in Arizona. The alternative relief for a stay is denied as moot in light of this ruling. (CCP 1710.50.) ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/EHG)

Mtn To Vacate Sister-State Judgmnt
Off Calendar Jun-20-2013 Continued To Jul-08-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - WILLIAM L. BUCHANAN, TEL. NO. 352-1064, ASSIGNEE FOR PLAINTIFF;
JASON MOORE, TEL. NO. 205-6458, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT JASON MOORE'S Motion To Vacate Sister-State Judgment and Stay enforcement is continued to July 8, 2013 per agreement of the parties. Opposition to be filed and served by June 21, 2013. Reply to be filed and served by June 28, 2013. Courtesy copies to be delivered to dept. 302 reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Judgment On Sister State Judgment And Stay Enforcement
Off Calendar May-03-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: JASON MOORE, DEFENDANT IN PRO PER; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JASON MOORE's Motion To Vacate Judgment On Sister State Judgment And Stay Enforcement is off calendar. While the Court received a copy of the motion, there is no proof of service. Judge: Peter Busch, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

Ntc Of Motion And Motion For Continuance
Off Calendar Mar-27-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling regarding ASSIGNEE WILLIAM BUCHANAN's Motion For Continuance. The Court treats the motion for continuance as a motion for relief per CCP 473. The evidence demonstrates that plaintiff never received the motion to vacate that was heard and granted as unopposed on February 27, 2013. The Court vacates the February 27, 2013 order. Defendant shall re-file and re-serve the motion to vacate. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.

Mtn To Vacate Judgmnt On Sister-State Judgmnt
Off Calendar Feb-27-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - JASON MOORE, TEL. NO. 205-6458, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JASON MOORE'S MOTION To Vacate Judgment On Sister-State Judgment is Granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 = (302/MJM)

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-14-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JASON MOORE's MOTION to SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT is off calendar because there is no proof of service. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
